## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and upcoming renewal conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI referral traffic shows significant growth, with Copilot emerging as a major source](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Content audit revealed opportunities for consolidation and optimization, particularly around survey distribution topics](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Frontline intelligence will be prioritized for upcoming content, replacing open enrollment focus](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [Renewal discussions scheduled for Friday to explore longer-term engagement and potential restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)

## Topics

### AI Referral Traffic Growth

  - [Substantial increase in AI-driven referrals, particularly from Copilot](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [12 leads generated so far this month, mostly from small to mid-size companies](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Two leads specifically mentioned finding Yourco through Google AI Overview and Microsoft Copilot](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### Content Audit and Optimization

  - [Over 100 pages ranking for targeted keywords](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [\~50 pages identified with content overlap, presenting consolidation opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [90 pages could benefit from enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Survey distribution content flagged for potential merging or restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Multilingual onboarding content deprioritized due to low performance and indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)

### Upcoming Content Strategy

  - [Shift focus from open enrollment to frontline intelligence in early November](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [Carrie conducting keyword research for frontline intelligence topics](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Event content repurposing discussed for November hospitality industry conference](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Citations increased significantly (158 growth)](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Position trending down 36% in Scrunch data, requires further investigation](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Overall positive trend in visibility and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### Renewal Discussion Preparation

  - [Kyle to present thoughts on restructuring engagement for longer-term collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)
  - [Potential discussion on adjusting annual subscription](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
  - [Jessica and Brody express satisfaction with GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica to review merge suggestions and prioritize topics for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2158.0)
  - [Carrie to complete keyword research for frontline intelligence content](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Team to deprioritize language-specific translation content](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2268.0)
  - [Prepare for renewal conversation on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)
  - [Continue monitoring indexing issues for remaining problematic pages](https://fathom.video/share/9oXuc2M2ky61Pe1VixzPthJx7fdPFKHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
